name: Print to Screen (Text)
asm_code:
mov si, msg_{ID}
mov bl, {COLOR}
call print_string_{ID}
jmp after_{ID}
msg_{ID} db '{TEXT}', 0
print_string_{ID}:
    pusha
.loop:
    lodsb
    or al, al
    jz .done
    mov ah, 0x09
    mov bh, 0
    mov cx, 1
    int 0x10
    mov ah, 0x03
    int 0x10
    inc dl
    mov ah, 0x02
    int 0x10
    jmp .loop
.done:
    popa
    ret
after_{ID}:
}
